protobufNullValue.description:
`NullValue` is a singleton enumeration to represent the null value for the
`Value` type union.

The JSON representation for `NullValue` is JSON `null`.

 - NULL_VALUE: Null value.

v1CreateTriggerResponse.description: CreateTriggerResponse is the response after creating a trigger.

v1DeleteTriggerResponse.description: DeleteTriggerResponse is the response after deleting a trigger.

v1GetTriggerResponse.description: GetTriggerResponse is the response containing a single trigger.

executionId.description: Execution started by the webhook (if any).

accepted.description: Whether the webhook was accepted and processed.

v1HandleWebhookResponse.description: HandleWebhookResponse is the response after processing a webhook.

v1ListTriggersResponse.description: ListTriggersResponse is the response for listing triggers.

pageSize.description: Number of items per page (max enforced per-service).

v1PaginationRequest.description: PaginationRequest is the standard offset-based pagination input.

totalItems.description: Total number of matching items (may be expensive for large datasets).

v1PaginationResponse.description: PaginationResponse is the standard offset-based pagination output.

workflowId.description: Workflow to execute when this trigger fires.

config.description: Type-specific configuration (e.g., cron expression, webhook path, filter rules).

enabled.description: Whether this trigger is currently active.

v1Trigger.description: Trigger defines a condition that automatically starts a workflow.

v1TriggerType.description:
TriggerType classifies the event source that initiates a workflow.

 - TRIGGER_TYPE_WEBHOOK: HTTP webhook callback.
 - TRIGGER_TYPE_CRON: Cron-based scheduled execution.
 - TRIGGER_TYPE_DB_CHANGE: Database change event (CDC).
 - TRIGGER_TYPE_MATTERMOST: Mattermost message or event.
 - TRIGGER_TYPE_MANUAL: Manual user-initiated trigger.
 - TRIGGER_TYPE_FILE_CHANGE: File system change event.
 - TRIGGER_TYPE_MAIL: Incoming email event.
 - TRIGGER_TYPE_PUBSUB: Pub/Sub message event.
 - TRIGGER_TYPE_WEBRTC: WebRTC signaling event.
 - TRIGGER_TYPE_TSUKASA_EVENT: Tsukasa platform event (employee, task, wiki changes).
 - TRIGGER_TYPE_CONTAINER: Container lifecycle event (start, stop, crash).
 - TRIGGER_TYPE_PROCESS: OS process event (start, exit, signal).
 - TRIGGER_TYPE_VM_EVENT: Virtual machine lifecycle event.

v1UpdateTriggerResponse.description: UpdateTriggerResponse is the response after updating a trigger.
